title: Claude Custom Connector Explained  | Connect Your Own APIs & Apps
summary: Claude Custom Connector is a feature that allows users to integrate Claude with their own APIs, databases, and internal systems beyond pre-built connectors like Google Drive and Gmail. It enables AI to work directly with proprietary or private data sources.
